name: Short Ribs Fdgn81a
recipeIngredient: 1 green bell pepper, cut into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe the meat with a damp cloth.
2. Trim off excess fat.
3. Combine flour, salt, and black pepper in a shallow dish.
4. Dredge the meat in the mixture to coat completely.
5. Heat shortening in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Brown ribs on all sides.
7. Remove ribs to a casserole with cover.
8. Sauté onions and garlic in the skillet until golden.
9. Spoon onion mixture over ribs.
10. Combine water, bay leaf, brown sugar, vinegar, and soy sauce in a bowl.
11. Pour liquid over ribs.
12. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes (75 minutes).
13. Add green bell pepper rings.
14. Continue cooking uncovered until meat is tender, about 15 to 20 additional minutes.
15. Remove cooked ribs and vegetables to a serving platter.
16. Skim fat from the drippings.
17. Thicken with a little flour if desired.
18. Spoon drippings over meat and vegetables.
The recipe may be halved or doubled. For 8 servings, use 1 1/2 cups hot water.
